summary: The synthetic evidence pack correctly treats source handles as opaque retrieval hints and avoids shadow storage, but requires architectural flattening to improve agent navigation and token efficiency.

findings.title: Repository structure lacks agent navigation optimization
findings.summary: The current file structure does not explicitly optimize for AI agent navigation or token efficiency, potentially increasing context window usage during downstream processing.

findings.title: Redundant placeholder content detected
findings.summary: The file contains synthetic placeholder content that may clutter the context window if not properly indexed or excluded from agent retrieval scopes.

findings.title: Manual evidence tracking instead of algorithmic tools
findings.summary: Evidence items are manually listed in markdown tables rather than using algorithmic scripts for traceability, which LLMs may process less efficiently.

decision.summary: The synthetic evidence pack correctly treats source handles as opaque retrieval hints and avoids shadow storage, but requires architectural flattening to improve agent navigation and token efficiency.

non_blocking_findings.title: Manual evidence tracking instead of algorithmic tools

follow_up: Flatten repository structure by moving evidence packs into a dedicated, indexable directory with clear naming conventions for agent retrieval.
Implement script-based evidence validation to replace manual markdown tables for improved token efficiency and agent navigation.
